# Max Phones Farm (maxphonesfarm.com)

> Factory-direct rackmount phone farm hardware from Guangzhou, China.

## About
Max Phones Farm is a Guangzhou hardware sourcing and assembly team supplying rackmount phone farm chassis, device lab boxes, motherboard arrays, and deployment accessories for enterprise device labs — app testing, ad verification, account environment management, remote device control, and QA automation workflows.

## Products
### Complete Systems
- Rackmount Phone Farm +20 — 2U rackmount, 20-device slots
- Enterprise Phone Farm Box — Standalone 20-node lab box
- Server-Style Device Farm — Multi-rack lab deployment packages

### Core Hardware
- Motherboard Box — Screenless Android node array
- Android Device Lab Starter — Compact evaluation chassis
- iPhone Device Lab Array — iOS QA lab hardware
- Empty Expansion Chassis — Custom build shell

### Accessories & Deployment Support
- Centralized Power Module, USB Backplane, Active Cooling Module, Lab Network Switch Kit, Remote Control Setup Service
